generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that bad actors exploit. My neighbor, a small business owner, had her data breached last year because of outdated protections. We need stronger domestic security powers to keep up with evolving threats. Trust me, I've spent decades in the trenches on this.
